Title: Licorice Pizza
Actors: Will Angarola, Griff Giacchino, James Kelley
Plot: LICORICE PIZZA is the story of Alana Kane and Gary Valentine growing up, running around and falling in love in the San Fernando Valley, 1973. Written and Directed by Paul Thomas Anderson, the film tracks the treacherous navigation of first love.
Awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 61 wins & 197 nominations total
